title: AGY-102: The UI Landscape & Selection (L100)
author: Tridorian Labs & Google Cloud
description: This course provides a comprehensive comparative tour of Google Antigravity's three main command interfaces: the standalone visual board (antigravity), the lightweight command line interface (agy), and the agent-integrated workspace editor (antigravity-ide). Learners will explore the design philosophy, target use cases, configuration setups, and selection workflows for each UI surface, culminating in a clear understanding of how to seamlessly coordinate across all three for peak agentic productivity.

features.title: Comparative Interface Tour
features.description: Master the functional differences between the CLI, Standalone UI, and IDE integration.

features.title: Practical CLI Pipes & Scripts
features.description: Learn to execute high-velocity batch tasks, folder queries, and CLI integration workflows using the native agy command line.

features.title: Cross-Interface Interoperability
features.description: Understand how the three interfaces synchronize under the hood to enable seamless workflow transitions.
